title: The Butcher's Nails
description: Makes you want to butcher animals and people for their skin, flesh and bones!
body:
# What is this?
With this datapack it's finally worth to hunt down and slay living creatures.

# What does it do?
- All living creatures who otherwise have skin and it makes sense to drop leather, now do drop leather. 
- They also drop bone.
- The loot increases with looting enchantment.
- Some also drop their respective loot: like villagers, wandering traders, piglins.
- Most if not all living creatures are covered.

# Enjoy butchering animals, people and other stuff! Happy hunting!
